items.title: A study of 8,300 older adults revealed a surprising salt habit

items.summary: For decades, pancreatic cancer has been one of the most lethal cancers, with few effective treatment options. items.title: Scientists discover the master clock that controls biological growth and development
items.summary: A newly discovered genetic clock acts as the master timekeeper for development, orchestrating crucial bursts of gene activity throughout a worm’s growth. When the clock is disrupted, development stops, offering fresh clues about how growth-related disorders may arise.
